Off Calendar May-02-2016 Continued To Jul-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shaun Carberry for (executor) Edvin Olsen.

The Court asked why the bond has not been filed. Mr. Carberry reported that he e-filed it yesterday, that the beneficiary has died, that the son is in Los Angeles, that they are trying probate in Los Angeles and that they hope to have letters issued by May 9, 2016. The Court confirmed that the bond amount was $231,000.00. The accounting petition was continued to July 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Continued To May-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Shaun Carberry to appear on May 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the issue of additional bond.

*** An ex parte application was filed on 4-11-16 addressing the additional bond. An Order to Appear will no longer be issued. The accounting petition was continued to May 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. ***

Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk:N. Wong, Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.
